name: Rutgers Rocket Propulsion Lab (RRPL)
relevance_explanation: Student-led team focusing on advancing high-powered rocketry technologies, competing in ESRA Spaceport America Cup

name: Rutgers Astronomical Society
relevance_explanation: Uniting those fascinated with space, discussing and observing the cosmos, hosting public observing nights

name: American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics (AIAA) - Rutgers Chapter
relevance_explanation: Professional society chapter focused on aeronautics and astronautics

name: Space Technology Association of Rutgers (STAR)
relevance_explanation: Student-led chapter of SEDS (Students for the Exploration and Development of Space), enables students to build rockets

name: SPACE Lab (Space Propulsion with Advanced Chemistry and Energetics Lab)
relevance_explanation: Research lab dedicated to advancing spaceflight and aerospace propulsion, exploring spacecraft and rocket propulsion, propellants and energetics

name: New Jersey Space Grant Consortium (NJSGC)
relevance_explanation: NASA's educational arm in New Jersey for higher education, supporting rocketry, ballooning, CubeSat programs, and aerospace research

name: RUAirborne
relevance_explanation: Competes in AIAA Design-Build-Fly Competition, researches aircraft design using computational fluid dynamics

name: RUAutonomous
relevance_explanation: Competes in AUVSI SUAS competition involving autonomous aerial systems for search and rescue operations

name: RU Pilots
relevance_explanation: Aviation training club teaching aerodynamics, navigation, and flight simulation

name: Society of Physics Students (Rutgers Chapter)
relevance_explanation: Physics student organization within Department of Physics and Astronomy, supporting physics education and community

name: Department of Physics and Astronomy - Astrophysics Research Group
relevance_explanation: Faculty and students pursuing observational and theoretical astrophysics programs studying galaxies, dark matter, cosmic structure

name: Planetary Sciences Major Track
relevance_explanation: Academic program focused on physical and geochemical processes in Solar System, planetary formation and evolution, prepares students for careers at NASA

name: Tse Research Group (Combustion Research)
relevance_explanation: Research group investigating combustion and propulsion, microgravity combustion processes relevant to spaceflight

name: Emil Buehler Aerospace Lab
relevance_explanation: Two-story testing space for drones and aerospace projects with supersonic wind tunnel facility

name: Gas Dynamics Research Lab (GDRL)
relevance_explanation: Experimental resources focused on exploring high-speed aerodynamics using Emil Buehler Supersonic Wind Tunnel

name: Promoting Electric Propulsion
relevance_explanation: Student organization focused on electric propulsion systems, recently chartered club

name: Robert A. Schommer Astronomical Observatory
relevance_explanation: Public observatory with 20-inch optical telescope hosting public viewing nights, used for astronomical observation and education

name: REU Program - Physics and Astronomy
relevance_explanation: NSF-funded Research Experiences for Undergraduates program in astronomy and astrophysics

name: Meteorology Program
relevance_explanation: Study of atmospheric processes including weather forecasting, radar evaluation, and atmospheric research using satellite data

name: Atmospheric Science Group
relevance_explanation: Research group studying physical, chemical, and biological processes governing atmospheric composition and climate, includes satellite remote sensing

name: RUCOOL (Rutgers Center for Ocean Observing Leadership)
relevance_explanation: Operates satellite remote sensing systems for ocean observation, delivers real-time satellite imagery for marine and coastal research

name: Center for Remote Sensing and Spatial Analysis (CRSSA)
relevance_explanation: Uses satellite remote sensing and GIS technology for environmental and natural resource applications including Landsat satellite imagery analysis

name: Materials Science and Engineering Department - Aerospace Materials Research
relevance_explanation: Research on ceramics, metals, polymers, and composites required in aerospace applications

name: Department of Earth and Planetary Sciences
relevance_explanation: Faculty and research focused on planetary sciences, studying Earth and other solar system bodies, planetary evolution and formation

name: Quantum Science Master's Program
relevance_explanation: Graduate program in quantum science with applications to quantum computing and quantum materials, relevant to space-based quantum communications and sensors

name: High Energy Physics Research Group
relevance_explanation: Research on cosmic rays, particle detectors, and high-energy phenomena relevant to understanding space radiation and cosmic particle interactions

name: Cosmology and Dark Matter Research Group
relevance_explanation: Faculty research on dark matter, dark energy, distant galaxies, cosmic microwave background, and large-scale structure of the universe

name: NJSGC Outreach Program - Rutgers Newark
relevance_explanation: NASA New Jersey Space Grant Consortium outreach program at Rutgers Newark campus supporting STEM education and space-related activities
